Air strike...

title: Odesa: 14 injured
title_en: Odesa: 14 injured
title_uk: Одеса: 14 постраждалих
description: Russian overnight strikes on Odesa residential buildings kill 2, injure 14. A Russian drone attack on several residential buildings in the southern Ukrainian city of Odesa killed two and left another 14 injured overnight on April 24, the State Emergency Service reported.
description_en: Russian overnight strikes on Odesa residential buildings kill 2, injure 14. A Russian drone attack on several residential buildings in the southern Ukrainian city of Odesa killed two and left another 14 injured overnight on April 24, the State Emergency Service reported.

title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про постраждалих
description: In Odessa, as a result of the Russian attack, 2 people died and 14 were injured, - State Emergency Service. Also, two 2-story residential buildings were destroyed, 7 people were injured. Also, an enemy anti-aircraft missile hit a 2-story building, killing 2 people.
description_en: In Odessa, as a result of the Russian attack, 2 people died and 14 were injured, - State Emergency Service. Also, two 2-story residential buildings were destroyed, 7 people were injured. Also, an enemy anti-aircraft missile hit a 2-story building, killing 2 people.
description_uk: В Одессе вследствие российской атаки погибли 2 человека и 14 пострадали, - ГСЧС В результате попадания в 3-этажный жилой дом разрушены квартиры, пострадали 6 человек. Также разрушены два 2-этажных жилых дома, пострадали 7 человек. Также вражеский БпЛА попал в 2-этажное здание, 2 человека погибли.

title: Remember, we wrote about the record number of immigrants in the EU...
title_en: Remember, we wrote about the record number of immigrants in the EU...
title_uk: Нагадаємо, ми писали про рекордну кількість іммігрантів в ЄС...
description: Remember, we wrote about the record number of immigrants in the EU countries, which reached 64.2 million people in 2025? So, here came an interesting video showing the penetration of illegal immigrants into the European Union since 2008. Each dot on the video is 100 migrants. 🤔
description_en: Remember, we wrote about the record number of immigrants in the EU countries, which reached 64.2 million people in 2025? So, here came an interesting video showing the penetration of illegal immigrants into the European Union since 2008. Each dot on the video is 100 migrants. 🤔
description_uk: Помните, мы писали о рекордном числе иммигрантов в странах ЕС, которое достигло 64,2 млн человек в 2025 году? Так вот, тут подъехала интересная видеографика, показывающая проникновение нелегальных иммигрантов в Европейский Союз с 2008 года. Каждая точка на видео - это 100 мигрантов. 🤔

title: Kyiv: Air defense active

description: Ukraine first to scale remotely operated interceptor drones, defense minister says. Ukraine has become the first country to scale the use of remotely operated interceptor drones capable of long-distance strikes, Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov said April 23, adding that the systems are already being used to destroy aerial targets in combat.
description_en: Ukraine first to scale remotely operated interceptor drones, defense minister says. Ukraine has become the first country to scale the use of remotely operated interceptor drones capable of long-distance strikes, Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov said April 23, adding that the systems are already being used to destroy aerial targets in combat.

description: Microsoft launches "vibe working" in Word, Excel and PowerPoint As The Verge writes, now there is an Agent Mode, to which it is enough to simply explain the task, after which the AI ​​itself will issue and fill out the document. 🔹 In Excel, the AI ​​itself collects formulas, tables and analyzes data. 🔹 In Word, AI writes the text itself, makes corrections and asks clarifying questions. 🔹 In PowerPoint, AI itself updates presentations and saves...
description_en: Microsoft launches "vibe working" in Word, Excel and PowerPoint As The Verge writes, now there is an Agent Mode, to which it is enough to simply explain the task, after which the AI ​​itself will issue and fill out the document. 🔹 In Excel, the AI ​​itself collects formulas, tables and analyzes data. 🔹 In Word, AI writes the text itself, makes corrections and asks clarifying questions. 🔹 In PowerPoint, AI itself updates presentations and saves...
description_uk: Microsoft запускает"вайбворкинг" в Word, Excel и PowerPoint Как пишет The Verge, теперь там есть Agent Mode, которому достаточно просто объяснить задачу, после чего ИИ сам оформит и заполнит документ. 🔹 В Excel ИИ сам собирает формулы, таблицы и анализирует данные. 🔹 В Word ИИ сам пишет текст, вносит правки и задает уточняющие вопросы. 🔹 В PowerPoint ИИ сам обновляет презентации и сохраняет...

title: Ukraine is currently actively working with the countries of the...
title_en: Ukraine is currently actively working with the countries of the...
title_uk: Зараз Україна активно працює з країнами...
description: Ukraine is currently actively working with the countries of the Middle East and the Gulf region. We are preparing cooperation with the Caucasus and are negotiating with other partners. And I want to emphasize: Ukraine offers not only drones, but a full-fledged defense system. For example, the Arab states have a strong anti-aircraft defense against missiles, and we help them to build defense against Shaheds and at sea. Such an integrated defense...
description_en: Ukraine is currently actively working with the countries of the Middle East and the Gulf region. We are preparing cooperation with the Caucasus and are negotiating with other partners. And I want to emphasize: Ukraine offers not only drones, but a full-fledged defense system. For example, the Arab states have a strong anti-aircraft defense against missiles, and we help them to build defense against Shaheds and at sea. Such an integrated defense...
description_uk: Україна зараз активно працює з країнами Близького Сходу та регіону Затоки. Ми готуємо співпрацю з Кавказом і ведемо переговори з іншими партнерами. І я хочу наголосити: Україна пропонує не лише дрони, а повноцінну систему оборони. Наприклад, арабські держави мають сильну протиповітряну оборону від ракет, а ми допомагаємо їм вибудувати захист від шахедів і на морі. Саме таку інтегровану оборону...

More than 181,000 units of purchased equipment have already been delivered to the battlefield, Fedorov added.

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
title_uk: Активна ППО
description: "Pysyuns" against "Shahedovs" Ukrainian P1-Sun drones from Skyfall, popularly known as "Pysyuns", have already intercepted more than 3,000 Russian "Shahedovs" in 2026, the adviser to the Ministry of Defense Anna Gvozdyar said. The average cost of such an interceptor is up to $3,000. At the same time, they make it possible to shoot down up to 90% of targets. For comparison: an air defense missile costs $20–30 thousand, "Shakhed" - up to $50 thousand. That is, while Russia is spending millions...
description_en: "Pysyuns" against "Shahedovs" Ukrainian P1-Sun drones from Skyfall, popularly known as "Pysyuns", have already intercepted more than 3,000 Russian "Shahedovs" in 2026, the adviser to the Ministry of Defense Anna Gvozdyar said. The average cost of such an interceptor is up to $3,000. At the same time, they make it possible to shoot down up to 90% of targets. For comparison: an air defense missile costs $20–30 thousand, "Shakhed" - up to $50 thousand. That is, while Russia is spending millions...
description_uk: "Писюны" против "Шахедов" Украинские дроны P1-Sun от Skyfall , в народе прозванные "Писюнами", уже перехватили более 3000 российских "Шахедов" в 2026 году, сообщила советник Минобороны Анна Гвоздяр. Средняя стоимость такого перехватчика - до $3000. При этом они позволяют сбивать до 90% целей. Для сравнения: ракета ПВО стоит $20–30 тысяч, "Шахед" - до $50 тысяч. То есть пока россия тратит миллионы...

The process of bringing to justice those guilty of the crime of aggression against Ukraine is gaining momentum. Justice is inevitable. Thank you to our Greek partners for supporting our efforts to ensure...
description_en: Greece Joins Agreement to Launch Special Tribunal for the Crime of Aggression Against Ukraine 💬 “Greece has just become the 22nd state to notify the Council of Europe of its intention to join the Enhanced Partial Agreement. The process of bringing to justice those guilty of the crime of aggression against Ukraine is gaining momentum. Justice is inevitable. Thank you to our Greek partners for supporting our efforts to ensure...
description_uk: Греція приєдналася до угоди для запуску Спецтрибуналу щодо злочину агресії проти України 💬 «Греція щойно стала 22-ю державою, яка повідомила Раду Європи про свій намір приєднатися до Розширеної часткової угоди. Набирає обертів процес притягнення до відповідальності винних у злочині агресії проти України. Справедливість неминуча. Дякуємо нашим грецьким партнерам за підтримку зусиль із забезпечення...

title: Today is an important day for our defense and for our relations with...
title_en: Today is an important day for our defense and for our relations with...
title_uk: Сьогодні важливий день для нашої оборони та для наших відносин з...
description: Today is an important day for our defense and for our relations with the European Union. The European support package for Ukraine has been unlocked - it is 90 billion euros for two years. This European package will strengthen our army, provide Ukraine with greater stability and allow us to fulfill our social obligations to Ukrainians as defined by law. It is important that Ukraine provides itself with such...
description_en: Today is an important day for our defense and for our relations with the European Union. The European support package for Ukraine has been unlocked - it is 90 billion euros for two years. This European package will strengthen our army, provide Ukraine with greater stability and allow us to fulfill our social obligations to Ukrainians as defined by law. It is important that Ukraine provides itself with such...
description_uk: Сьогодні важливий день для нашого захисту і для наших відносин із Євросоюзом. Розблоковано європейський пакет підтримки для України – це 90 мільярдів євро на два роки. Цей європейський пакет додасть сили нашій армії, забезпечить Україні більше стійкості та дозволить нам виконувати соціальні зобовʼязання перед українцями так, як це визначено законом. Важливо, що Україна забезпечує собі таку...

We expect that this number will continue to grow. All countries are invited, not only European ones. Part of the world does not matter when it comes to the universal value of respect for international law and the need to ensure...

We expect that this number will continue to grow. All countries are invited, not only European ones. Part of the world does not matter when it comes to the universal value of respect for international law and the need to ensure...
description_uk: Фінляндія приєдналася до угоди для запуску Спецтрибуналу щодо злочину агресії проти України 💬 «Фінляндія стала 21-ю державою, яка офіційно долучилася до Трибуналу. Очікуємо, що ця кількість і надалі зростатиме. Запрошуються всі держави, не лише європейські. Частина світу не має значення, коли йдеться про універсальну цінність поваги до міжнародного права та необхідність забезпечення...
